content: [Task Assignment] T-ECOMMERCE-061: Execute routine: Verify product sync accuracy daily: ensure all 37+ products have correct pricing, variant availability, images, and descriptions matching Shopify catalog
[Task Assignment] T-LEGAL-066: Execute routine: Monitor regulatory calendars for filing deadlines (tax registrations, trademark office actions, compliance certifications)
[Task Assignment] T-STRATEGY-055: Execute routine: Track key market indicators (Google Trends for wall art, social media sentiment, competitor pricing changes, new market entrants) on a weekly basis
